method.name: TryConvertFallback

method.name: TryConvertAny

method.name: WhenChanged
method.signature: <TObj, T1, T2, T3>(TObj, System.Linq.Expressions.Expression<System.Func<TObj, T1>>, System.Linq.Expressions.Expression<System.Func<TObj, T2>>, System.Linq.Expressions.Expression<System.Func<TObj, T3>>)
